metadata.description: Procedural recipes for 50+ common environmental props. Chapter 1: The Living Room & Furniture.

terminology.procedural: Generating geometry via parameters instead of manual sculpting
terminology.leg_offset: The distance from the corner of a table/chair to the leg center
terminology.slats: The horizontal or vertical bars in a chair back or fence
terminology.array: Copying an item multiple times in a row

chains.title: Procedural Four-Legged Table (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Build a table where leg positions and top thickness are adjustable
chains.output_description: A rectangular table with four legs positioned at the corners.

chains.title: Procedural Kitchen Chair (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Create a chair with a seat, 4 legs, and a backrest
chains.output_description: A high-detail chair model with a backrest and four legs.

chains.title: Procedural Sofa Core (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Build a modular sofa with seat and armrests
chains.output_description: A rounded upholstered sofa base.

chains.title: Procedural TV Stand (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Cabinet with shelving area and top surface
chains.output_description: A hollow cabinet-style TV stand with small legs.

chains.title: Procedural Coffee Table (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Round glass-top coffee table with metal base
chains.output_description: A stylish round coffee table with a 3-legged metal frame.

chains.title: Procedural Ottoman (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Upholstered round footstool with seams
chains.output_description: A soft-looking round footstool with procedural surface noise and top seams.

chains.title: Procedural Bookshelf (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Build a modular shelf where the number of levels is controlled by a loop
chains.output_description: A vertical bookshelf with 6 levels generated via metadata loop.

chains.title: Procedural Area Rug (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Rectangle rug with soft edges and fringe points
chains.output_description: A flat floor rug with subtle height variation and frayed edge points.

chains.title: Procedural Window Curtains (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Simulated wavy curtains hanging from a rod
chains.output_description: A pair of decorative window curtains with horizontal rod.

chains.title: Procedural Floor Lamp (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Tall standing lamp with lampshade
chains.output_description: A floor-standing lamp with a tapered lampshade.

chains.title: Procedural Kitchen Cabinet (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Under-counter storage unit with door and handle
chains.output_description: A standard kitchen base cabinet with a front-facing door.

chains.title: Procedural Kitchen Sink (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Countertop-mounted basin with faucet
chains.output_description: A recessed kitchen sink integrated into a section of countertop.

chains.title: Procedural Oven/Stove (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Kitchen appliance with stove burners and front glass
chains.output_description: A standalone electric oven with 4 stove-top burners.

chains.title: Procedural Refrigerator (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Large tall kitchen appliance with dual door split
chains.output_description: A double-door tall refrigerator with modern handles.

chains.title: Procedural Dining Table (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Large wooden rectangular table for a dining room
chains.output_description: A heavy-set wooden dining table.

chains.title: Procedural Dining Chair (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Elegant chair that matches the dining table
chains.output_description: A dining room chair with tapered legs and a high back.

chains.title: Procedural Microwave (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Small countertop kitchen appliance
chains.output_description: A compact kitchen microwave.

chains.title: Procedural Wine Bottle (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Classic tapered glass wine bottle
chains.output_description: A realistic glass wine bottle with internal liquid volume.

chains.title: Procedural Drinking Glass (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Glass tumbler with rounded base
chains.output_description: A hollow glass drinking tumbler.

chains.title: Procedural Dining Plate (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Shallow ceramic plate with raised rim
chains.output_description: A high-quality ceramic dining plate.

chains.title: Procedural Door with Frame (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Standard interior door with multi-part frame and knob
chains.output_description: A complete architectural door with a swept frame and hardware.

chains.title: Procedural Window with Muttons (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Division of a window pane into smaller glass sections
chains.output_description: A window with structural dividers (muttons) for multiple glass panes.

chains.title: Procedural Spiral Staircase (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Central-pole staircase with rotating steps

parms.snippet: float i = detail(1, 'iteration'); float angle = i * 0.4; matrix3 m = ident(); rotate(m, angle, {0,1,0}); @P *= m; @P.y = i * 0.18;

chains.output_description: A procedural spiral staircase wound around a central support pole.

chains.title: Procedural Gothic Arched Window (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Pointed arch window commonly used in cathedrals
chains.output_description: An architectural gothic arch window with a signature pointed top.

chains.title: Procedural Industrial Support Pillar (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Heavy-duty structural column with rivets
chains.output_description: A bolted-together industrial support column for warehouses or factories.

chains.title: Procedural Picket Fence Section (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Interlocking fence pieces that can follow a curve
chains.output_description: A single modular section of a picket fence.

chains.title: Procedural Brick Wall (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Wall segment composed of individual offset bricks
chains.output_description: A section of brick wall where every second row is offset for traditional bond.

chains.title: Procedural Roof Shingle (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Overlapping weather-resistant roof tiles
chains.output_description: A tiled roof surface using overlapping procedural shingles.

chains.title: Procedural Balustrade Railing (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Decorative balcony railing with repeating spindles
chains.output_description: A decorative outdoor or indoor railing.

chains.title: Procedural Skylight (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Roof-mounted window with angled frame
chains.output_description: A functional skylight for architectural roofs.

chains.title: Procedural Street Lamp Post (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Tall city street light with curved arm
chains.output_description: A high-fidelity street lamp with a swept arm and box-style light fixture.

chains.title: Procedural Park Bench (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Classic public bench with wooden slats and metal supports
chains.output_description: A public park bench with cast iron supports and wooden slats.

chains.title: Procedural Fire Hydrant (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Classic red American municipal fire hydrant
chains.output_description: A detailed 3-nozzle fire hydrant model.

chains.title: Procedural Trash Bin (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Square municipal waste bin with lid and side slot
chains.output_description: A public trash bin with a side collection slot.

chains.title: Procedural Traffic Cone (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Standard orange safety cone with base
chains.output_description: A classic bright orange safety traffic cone.

chains.title: Procedural Road Barrier (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Modular concrete K-rail or plastic water barrier
chains.output_description: A heavy-duty concrete road barrier with utility cutouts.

chains.title: Procedural Bus Shelter (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Glass and steel urban transportation shelter
chains.output_description: A modern urban bus stop with glass walls and a tilted roof.

chains.title: Procedural Sewer Manhole (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Street-level manhole cover with tread pattern
chains.output_description: A circular street-mounted sewer maintenance cover.

chains.title: Procedural Street Sign (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Metal signpost with rectangular information plate
chains.output_description: A standard roadside street sign.

chains.title: Procedural Bollard (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Short vertical post to prevent vehicle traffic
chains.output_description: A safety bollard with high-visibility markings.

chains.title: Procedural Laptop (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Foldable portable computer with keyboard area and screen

parms.snippet: matrix3 m = ident(); rotate(m, radians(-110), {1,0,0}); @P *= m;

chains.output_description: An open laptop model with a tilted screen and defined keyboard area.

chains.title: Procedural Computer Monitor (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Widescreen display with adjustable stand
chains.output_description: A flat-screen computer monitor on a circular stand.

chains.title: Procedural Tea Cup / Mug (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Drinking mug with a curved handle
chains.output_description: A standard ceramic coffee or tea mug.

chains.title: Procedural Desk Lamp (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Adjustable office lamp with conical head
chains.output_description: An articulated desk lamp.

chains.title: Procedural Open Book (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Open book with curved pages
chains.output_description: A book lying open on a flat surface.

chains.title: Procedural Book Stack (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: A vertical pile of closed books with random rotation
chains.output_description: A vertically messy stack of five scholarly books.

chains.title: Procedural Cardboard Box (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Shipping box with seam indentations
chains.output_description: A standard brown shipping box.

chains.title: Procedural Paint Can (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Industrial metal can with handle and lid
chains.output_description: A 1-gallon paint can with a wire handle.

chains.title: Procedural Sharp Rock (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Craggy terrain stone with directional noise
chains.output_description: A sharp, low-poly environmental rock.

chains.title: Procedural Smooth Pebble (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Eroded river stone
chains.output_description: A smooth, oval-shaped river pebble.

chains.title: Procedural Stylized Tree (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Lollipop-style tree with trunk and bulbous leaves
chains.output_description: A stylized low-poly environmental tree.

chains.title: Procedural Grass Tuft (High Fidelity)
chains.goal: Group of curved grass blades
chains.output_description: A small clump of procedural grass blades.
